# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Pegasus 4.4.4 save-backed outpost availability overrides. Native expansion
# targets, system scores, pathing, threat, influence, biological-ship rules,
# wilderness terraforming exclusion, weights, and desired minima remain.
# Colonization plans now dampen allocation weight instead of making the lane
# categorically unavailable. The alloy source's ambiguous multi-statement NOT
# is normalized to the explicit NOR already used by the biological analogue.

alloys_expenditure_starbases_expand = {
	resource = alloys
	type = expenditure
	category = starbases


	weight = {
		weight = 0.2

		# Biological Starbases use less alloys
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		}
		# Prefer colonization without making native outpost funding ineligible.
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.25
			ai_colonize_plans > 0
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = 150
	}

	potential = {
		has_ai_expansion_plan = yes
		highest_threat < 50
		NOR = {
			is_country_type = fallen_empire
			is_country_type = awakened_fallen_empire
		}
		has_resource = { type = influence amount > 75 }
	}
}

food_expenditure_starbases_expand = {
	resource = food
	type = expenditure
	category = starbases


	weight = {
		weight = 0.2
		# Match alloy-lane availability dampening for biological construction.
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.25
			ai_colonize_plans > 0
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = 300
	}

	potential = {
		country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		has_ai_expansion_plan = yes
		highest_threat < 50
		NOR = {
			is_country_type = fallen_empire
			is_country_type = awakened_fallen_empire
			OR = {
				AND = {
					is_wilderness_empire = yes
					ai_terraform_plans > 0
				}
			}
		}
		has_resource = { type = influence amount > 75 }
	}
}
